title: Amplified Vanilla Experience
description: A modpack about creating a Vanilla+ experience with about 100 mods that enhance this experience further.
body:
_Amplified Vanilla Experience enhances the Minecraft Gameplay by adding Mods that stay true to the Vanilla Plus feeling._




<details>
<summary>Core Mods</summary>

- Create
- Quark
- Supplementaries
- Alex's Mobs & Caves
- Farmer's Delight
- Yung's Structures

</details>
